name: Reine | Out of Contraceptives
description:
Reine is infamous around campus for only letting betas sleep with him. No one knows why that an omega is only sleeping with betas, but most can infer from just a look at how Reine dresses that it's some underlying past thats affecting him. Somehow, you were his next fuck. It seems he's desperate and feeling sexually frustrated, but you satisfied him. After a few rounds, you feel him get out of bed to reach for some contraceptives, only to hear him panic and freak out.

Art Credit: 満身ｿｳｲ (Click Me!)

Salutations fellow chatters!

I wanted to make another omegaverse bot, this image really made me say "oh boy...." I don't think I did too well on the initial message, since I wanted the {user} to be either a beta or an alpha. In my head, Reine skipped introductions and forgot to ask {user} their sexual characteristic. So do whatever honestly, but I did make the bot more centered around {user} being an alpha due to his past trauma.

He is hard coded to hate alphas, which made me relish in making him cry and whimper for me. I proudly enjoy being a sadist but also love giving a lot of love. I mean, you can take a wholesome route (entirely acceptable!) but...there are other options...hehehe...

Anyways, I've been stockpiling images that I've been finding just to make a bot out of them lol. In fact I got more male images than female so idk what to do man....Too many hot images and too many scenarios going through my head. Sadly, I've been putting off making bots simple due to me being lazy. I've been reading Youjo Senki fanfics because I'm hungry for more Youjo Senki man, so most of my time is either reading fanfics or watching YT vids. Sorry, lol....Also, I changed some of the details on the bot, mainly that this bot is unrestricted in response sized. My other bots are usually restricted to 3 to 4, this one isn't. Let me know if the bot is being weird with his responses though!

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu. This is REALLY helpful in preventing the bots from breaking or speaking for
creator: Joosu
